title: Footer, Divider, and Utility Styling
description: Refactor remaining CSS selectors including .footer, .divider, and .hidden utility class. Update footer and divider colors with CSS variables. Ensure all remaining hardcoded hex values are migrated. This task completes the CSS variable migration.

criteria: Zero remaining hardcoded hex color values in CSS (except inside comments)
All selectors use CSS variables consistently
convergence.verification: grep -c '#[0-9a-fA-F]\{3,6\}' packages/ccc-state-controller/panel/index.js | xargs -I {} sh -c 'test {} -le 2 && echo PASS || echo FAIL'
convergence.definition_of_done: All CSS migrated to CSS variables, zero hardcoded hex values remaining

files.change: Update .footer, .divider, .hidden selectors and verify complete migration (lines 280-298)

implementation.title: Migrate footer styles
modification_points: Replace border-top: 1px solid #444 with border-top: 1px solid var(--border-default)

implementation.title: Final verification and cleanup
implementation.description: Verify all hardcoded colors are migrated, add any missing variables
modification_points: Scan for remaining hardcoded hex values: grep '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}'
Replace any remaining hardcoded values with CSS variables
logic_flow: Run grep to find remaining hex values
Replace each found value with appropriate variable

pre_analysis.action: Find all remaining hardcoded hex colors

context: Progress and log components with semantic colors

rationale.complete_migration: This task ensures 100% CSS variable adoption for maintainability
